title: Chelbown #2463
definition:
Helbon = "fertile"

 1) a town a few miles northwest of Damascus, modern 'Helbon', still
    noted for its fine grapes
nasbUsage:
Definition: Helbon = "fertile"

 1) a town a few miles northwest of Damascus, modern 'Helbon', still
    noted for its fine grapes

    NASB:  a place in Aram (Syria)
